title: Better Fonts
description: Make text on Minecraft more readable!
body:
This is a resource pack that is a slight modification of stock Minecraft at 32x. This should allow for improved readability as well as a more cosmetically consistent font style. People should have even less trouble reading text in the game.

For reference, a vanilla-themed 32x resource pack is provided by [the Faithful team](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)
